fn build_matrix(rows: usize, cols: usize) -> Vec<Vec<f64>> {
    let mut matrix = Vec::new();
    // BAD: Vec::push without capacity hint causes repeated reallocation
    for r in 0..rows {
        let mut row = Vec::new();
        for c in 0..cols {
            row.push((r * cols + c) as f64);
        }
        matrix.push(row);
    }
    matrix
}
